scripts.dev: hugo server || cd exampleSite && hugo server --themesDir ../..
scripts.preview: hugo server --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged --templateMetrics --templateMetricsHints --watch --forceSyncStatic -e production --minify  || cd exampleSite && hugo server --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged --templateMetrics --templateMetricsHints --watch --forceSyncStatic -e production --minify
